settings.custom_liquid:
🚧 Service Update: Restorations are currently paused. We are working through our queue!

Join Waitlist

Revive Your Legend

Professional Restoration for SX-70 & SLR 680

We don’t just fix cameras; we preserve history. Our comprehensive restoration service brings your vintage Polaroid back to factory-fresh performance.

Join The Waitlist

🛠️ The Full CLA

  • Mechanical Check: Full diagnostic of gears & motor.
  • Deep Clean: Removal of fungus, dust, and debris.
  • Lubrication: Fresh lube for smooth ejection.
  • Calibration: Light meter and shutter timing adjusted.

⚡ 600-Film Mod

Optional & Free with Restoration

We calibrate your camera to shoot modern Polaroid 600 film (ISO 640) natively without filters.

Note: Early models that cannot be converted will be refunded or notified.

🎨 Leather Reskin

Choose new leather or keep it original.

Important: To access the screws for repair, we must remove the bottom leather panel. If you choose "Keep Original," the bottom panel will be replaced with a matching new piece.

How It Works

1

Book / Waitlist

Secure your slot online.

2

Prep

Remove film, straps, and flashbars.

3

Ship

Wrap in 1" bubble wrap. Box only (no envelopes).

4

Repair

Typical turnaround: 8–12 days.

🛡️ 6-Month Warranty

Covers mechanical defects and workmanship.
(Excludes: Drops, water, sand damage)

Frequently Asked Questions

Typically 8–12 days from receipt, though this can vary depending on our queue depth.

Please check your tracking number. If it says "Delivered," we have it! You can email us with your Order Number for absolute confirmation.

In the unlikely event a repair isn't possible, we will contact you to discuss options or refunds.

settings.question: How long does a repair take?
settings.answer: Our standard turnaround time is 2-4 weeks depending on how many cameras are in our repair queue. Sometimes this takes a bit longer if a camera needs more extensive servicing. We do not have a rush service at this time.

settings.question: Can I troubleshoot my own issue with my camera?
settings.answer:
We have a few videos troubleshooting in our channel here. https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PL3SpFGXiJgNtGXI2L8SKdFZ9-xOou_rhF&si=6JYRuKvrVPH4Rvsb

Within that playlist, If you are unable to find a troubleshoot relevant to the issue you are experiencing, it most likely requires an in-depth and specific solution; which our technicians can most likely provide within our refurbishment.

settings.question: Can I talk to the technician about my camera?
settings.answer: Due to the high volume of cameras, it is not possible to have direct communication with our technician. If you have any questions or specific notes regarding your camera, please email us atsx70@brooklynfilmcamera.com.

settings.question: If I have a specific leather I would like to be placed on my camera after repair, can I mail it to you?
settings.answer: Of course. After our technician refurbishes it, our aesthetic technician will clean and re leather it for you.

settings.question: How long is your waitlist
settings.answer: We expect our current waitlist to take 4-6 weeks to catch up.

settings.question: Do you repair box cameras?
settings.answer: No, currently we only service folding SX-70 cameras.

settings.question: Do you repair digital cameras?
settings.answer: No, currently we only service analog film cameras.

settings.question: Are parts replacement included with the repair cost?
settings.answer: Replacing a part of the camera is not included in the repair cost. If parts are broken when the camera is sent in, we will invoice you for the cost of replacing it.

settings.question: Can I ship my camera to you?
settings.answer: Yes! But only via our provided labels. Do not mail in your camera to us without first receiving a label

settings.heading: Revive Your Gear.
settings.subheading: SX-70 cameras can be up to 53 years old and are in much need of some attention. Time causes key elements of the camera to oxidize and/or corrode which hinders the camera’s performance along with the possibility of parts breaking through wear and tear. Our Polaroid SX-70 Restoration Service includes a diagnostic check of all mechanical parts, a comprehensive Cleaning, Lubrication, and Adjustment (CLA). We offer the option to have the camera’s original leather replaced with a brand new leather covering. All refurbished cameras come with a 6 month mechanical warranty.
settings.list_1_content:
SX70 Cameras are evaluated and fully disassembled.

_

Boards are detail cleaned, every part is serviced and evaluated for function.

_

Every SX70 restoration includes top down restoration, not just the parts causing issues.
settings.list_2_content:
• Free optional 600 Upgrade
  • Optional Board Upgrade (coming soon)
  • Optional New Viewfinder Stickers
  • Optional free new skins
settings.shipping_content:
You will be emailed a label upon ordering a restoration. Do not mail us your camera to our storefront address we will not get the package and your item will be lost.

Please see your email after ordering for mail in instructions.
settings.polaroid_text: This is for Polaroid only, for 35mm and 120 repair see our repairs page
